description: YAML closely mirrors BSV structure. Each BSV construct (typedef, enum, struct, function, interface, module, rule) has a corresponding YAML representation. Compiler uses Two-Phase strategy: Phase 1 generates type definitions, Phase 2 generates module code. LLM agent (ccb) translates YAML descriptions to BSV.
yaml_style: L3-level detail: provides type names, field names, function signatures explicitly. Natural language used for behavioral descriptions.
